# The Garden Story

The **cat** sat on the mat. The cat looked at the dog. The dog barked at the cat.

## Chapter One

The cat ran away from the dog. The dog chased the cat around the garden.
The garden was full of flowers. The flowers were *beautiful* and colorful.

- The cat hid behind the flowers.
- The dog searched for the cat in the garden.

## Chapter Two

The cat climbed the tree in the garden. The tree was tall and old.
The dog waited under the tree. The cat watched the dog from the tree.

> The bird flew over the tree. The bird sang a beautiful song.

The cat wanted to catch the bird. The dog lost interest and went home.

### Epilogue

The cat came down from the tree. The cat walked through the [garden](https://example.com).
The flowers swayed in the wind. The wind was gentle and warm.
The sun shone brightly over the garden. The cat found a sunny spot and slept.
The dog came back to the garden. The dog and the cat became friends.
They played together in the garden every day.

---

*The End*
